ns0:entry.ns0:title: Agent-Field/agentfield
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Agent-Field/agentfield
Language: go
Build, run and scale AI agents like API and microservices - observable,auditable and identity-aware from day one.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Armur-Ai/Pentest-Swarm-AI
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Armur-Ai/Pentest-Swarm-AI
Language: go
Autonomous penetration testing using a swarm of AI agents. Orchestrates recon, classification, exploitation, and reporting specialists with ReAct reasoning — supports bug bounty, continuous monitoring, and CTF modes. Built with Go, Claude API, and 7+ native security tools.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ArvinLovegood/go-stock
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ArvinLovegood/go-stock
Language: go
🦄🦄🦄AI赋能股票分析：AI加持的股票分析/选股工具。股票行情获取，AI热点资讯分析，AI资金/财务分析，涨跌报警推送。支持A股，港股，美股。支持市场整体/个股情绪分析，AI辅助选股等。数据全部保留在本地。支持DeepSeek，OpenAI， Ollama，LMStudio，AnythingLLM，硅基流动，火山方舟，阿里云百炼等平台或模型。

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Layr-Labs/d-inference
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Layr-Labs/d-inference
Language: go
Private Inference Network on Idle Macs

ns0:entry.ns0:title: SagerNet/sing-box
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/SagerNet/sing-box
Language: go
The universal proxy platform

ns0:entry.ns0:title: TecharoHQ/anubis
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/TecharoHQ/anubis
Language: go
Weighs the soul of incoming HTTP requests to stop AI crawlers

ns0:entry.ns0:title: aquasecurity/trivy
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/aquasecurity/trivy
Language: go
Find vulnerabilities, misconfigurations, secrets, SBOM in containers, Kubernetes, code repositories, clouds and more

ns0:entry.ns0:title: danielmiessler/Fabric
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/danielmiessler/Fabric
Language: go
Fabric is an open-source framework for augmenting humans using AI. It provides a modular system for solving specific problems using a crowdsourced set of AI prompts that can be used anywhere.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dapr/dapr
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dapr/dapr
Language: go
Dapr is a portable runtime for building distributed applications across cloud and edge, combining event-driven architecture with workflow orchestration.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix
Language: go
DeepSeek-native AI coding agent for your terminal. Engineered around prefix-cache stability — leave it running.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: everywall/ladder
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/everywall/ladder
Language: go
Selfhosted alternative to 12ft.io. and 1ft.io. Proxy to remove CORS headers and modify HTML

ns0:entry.ns0:title: go-gitea/gitea
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/go-gitea/gitea
Language: go
Git with a cup of tea! Painless self-hosted all-in-one software development service, including Git hosting, code review, team collaboration, package registry and CI/CD

ns0:entry.ns0:title: google/adk-go
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/google/adk-go
Language: go
An open-source, code-first Go toolkit for building, evaluating, and deploying sophisticated AI agents with flexibility and control.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: gosom/google-maps-scraper
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/gosom/google-maps-scraper
Language: go
scrape data from Google Maps. Extracts data such as the name, address, phone number, website URL, rating, reviews number, latitude and longitude, reviews,email and more for each place

ns0:entry.ns0:title: guohuiyuan/go-music-dl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/guohuiyuan/go-music-dl
Language: go
一个基于 Go 语言的全网音乐搜索与下载工具。支持 CLI 命令行与 Web 服务双模式，内置网易云、QQ、酷狗、Bilibili、汽水音乐等 10+ 个主流平台，支持多源并发搜索与无损音质解析。music-dl交流群：1074285005

ns0:entry.ns0:title: haierkeys/fast-note-sync-service
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/haierkeys/fast-note-sync-service
Language: go
High-performance, low-latency note synchronization, online management, and remote REST API service platform.

Language: go
The Kubernetes Package Manager

Language: go
Open-source platform for creating safe, isolated production sandboxes for API, integration, and E2E testing.
